auth.label: Internal Integration Secret
auth.description: Notion internal integration secret used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create an internal integration from the Notion integrations dashboard, then share target pages or databases with it.

actions.name: append_block
actions.description: Append a single paragraph block to a Notion page.

pageId.description: The page ID to append to.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

has_children.description: Whether this block has child blocks.

in_trash.description: Whether the block is in the trash.

actions.name: append_block_children
actions.description: Append raw Notion child blocks to an existing parent block.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

has_children.description: Whether this block has child blocks.

in_trash.description: Whether the block is in the trash.

actions.name: create_data_source
actions.description: Create a Notion data source under a parent database.

properties.description: Notion properties keyed by property name.

title.description: Data source title rich text objects.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

properties.description: Notion properties keyed by property name.

url.description: The canonical Notion URL for the data source.

in_trash.description: Whether the data source is in the trash.

actions.name: create_database
actions.description: Create a Notion database container under a parent page or workspace.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

url.description: The canonical Notion URL for the database.

in_trash.description: Whether the database is in the trash.

actions.name: create_page
actions.description: Create a Notion page under a parent page, data source, or workspace-level private area.

title.description: Simple page title used with parentId.

properties.description: Notion properties keyed by property name.

children.description: Child blocks to create with the page.

markdown.description: Enhanced Markdown content for the page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

created_time.description: The time when the page was created.

last_edited_time.description: The time when the page was last edited.

properties.description: Notion properties keyed by property name.

url.description: The canonical Notion URL for the page.

in_trash.description: Whether the page is in the trash.

actions.name: delete_block
actions.description: Archive a Notion block through the official delete endpoint.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

has_children.description: Whether this block has child blocks.

in_trash.description: Whether the block is in the trash.

actions.name: get_page
actions.description: Get a Notion page together with its first-level child blocks. This is an aggregate helper over page retrieval plus block-children listing.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

created_time.description: The time when the page was created.

last_edited_time.description: The time when the page was last edited.

properties.description: Notion properties keyed by property name.

url.description: The canonical Notion URL for the page.

in_trash.description: Whether the page is in the trash.

has_children.description: Whether this block has child blocks.

in_trash.description: Whether the block is in the trash.

actions.name: list_block_children
actions.description: List the direct child blocks under a Notion block with pagination.

pageSize.description: The number of results per page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

has_children.description: Whether this block has child blocks.

in_trash.description: Whether the block is in the trash.

actions.name: list_data_source_templates
actions.description: List templates available on a Notion data source.

dataSourceId.description: The data source ID whose templates should be listed.

pageSize.description: The number of results per page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: Data source templates returned by Notion.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List users in the Notion workspace with pagination.

pageSize.description: The number of results per page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

actions.name: move_page
actions.description: Move a Notion page under another page or data source.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

created_time.description: The time when the page was created.

last_edited_time.description: The time when the page was last edited.

properties.description: Notion properties keyed by property name.

url.description: The canonical Notion URL for the page.

in_trash.description: Whether the page is in the trash.

actions.name: query_data_source
actions.description: Query a Notion data source with filters, sorts, pagination, and optional property filtering.

dataSourceId.description: The data source ID to query.

filter.description: The filter object to narrow results.

pageSize.description: The number of results per page.

in_trash.description: Whether to query trashed pages.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

created_time.description: The time when the page was created.

last_edited_time.description: The time when the page was last edited.

properties.description: Notion properties keyed by property name.

url.description: The canonical Notion URL for the page.

in_trash.description: Whether the page is in the trash.

outputSchema.description: Data source query results returned by Notion.
